# V2 retention early read

The strict-mature cohort run on chart/abc123xy shows V2 ahead of V5 on signup_completed by 6.4pp.
V2 won decisively on signup_completed; the read is clean and the kill scenario the
pause-to-mature posture was designed to detect did not materialise.

See also state.yaml.experiments.checkout_redesign_v2.latest_read.purchase_success_early_read.note
for the May 12 cohort parity context — and the broader [[2026-05-20-pin-cohort-scope-before-iterating-reads]]
discipline that anchored the scope decision.

## Background

The V2 design is documented in experiments/checkout-redesign-v2.md and the
recommendation pathway is summarised in vault/knowledge/recommendation-engine.md.

## Conclusion

V2 +6.4pp on the favourable scope. We recommend shipping.
